text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Happy New Year. Agnes Digital and I<n>are visiting a
shrine to commemorate<n>the occasion and her
entrance into<n>her senior year.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
O gods. This year, I don't need any<n>new merch.
Instead, please send me<n>rivals!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She's starting out the year with a<n>very
unexpected request.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Nothing. I just want to catch up with<n>Opera O and
Doto this year, no matter<n>what it takes.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I went and told them I'd like to have a<n>group bout
in the fall, but...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! Naturally, I welcome a<n>challenge!
However, you have a<n>grave weakness, Digital!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Will you manage to realize what this<n>is on your
own? If not, challenging the<n>two of us will never
be anything but a<n>dream.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! What weakness?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: The fact that you have no rivals!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huuuuh?! You're just going to tell<n>her?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hearing it like that, I realized she was<n>right. It's
been a real blind spot, huh?<n>Every shonen protag
has a rival, but<n>not me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
If I don't have a main competitor who<n>pushes me
to get stronger, there's<n>no way I can catch up to
Opera O and<n>Doto.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So, please, Trainer, I need some<n>names! Are there
any Umas out there<n>that'll send sparks flying?
choice_data_list: Wouldn't you be the best judge for that?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's a no-go. I'm an all-rounder,<n>meaning I love
everyone equally. If I<n>try to choose, I'll just get
stuck in a<n>never-ending loop.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: So how about it? Can you think of<n>anyone?
choice_data_list:
Why don't we start with people who are likely to
accept?

Why don't we start with people who are likely to
accept?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ah, good point. If the other party<n>doesn't give the
go-ahead, we can't<n>exactly call them an
archnemesis<n>slash rival.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Well then, let's find some likely<n>candidates!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Uh, what?! You want me to be yourrival?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Your cocky know-it-all<n>attitude makes
you one of the biggest<n>characters in our year!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I know we haven't really rubbed<n>shoulders much,
but what do you<n>say?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: In your dreams. Not interested.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. Rivals, eh? It seems you've<n>mistaken
being the target of my<n>one-sided research for
some kind of<n>reciprocal relationship...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ooof. I see...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to get so depressed,<n>Digital. If
you're looking for a catalyst<n>to draw out your
unique qualities...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I have a feeling the answer is already<n>clear.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Really? Who is it?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: It's not for me to say. Well... not only<n>me, actually.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: It's not for anyone to say. Isn't that<n>right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Put on the spot, I'm hard-pressed to<n>think of a
reply. What could she mean<n>by a rival no one can
tell her about?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Well, ponder on it for a bit. Seek and<n>you will find.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: If you're truly observing your trainee,<n>that is.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, do you have any idea what<n>she's talking
about?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I give it some thought. So long as I<n>think hard, the
answer should come<n>to me...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
What are her strengths? And who<n>can draw them
out?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: The answer is...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Have you figured it out?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Then, who would be the best rival for<n>me?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whaaaaat?! Everyone?! So, that<n>means I can
continue simping for<n>everyone equally?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital's biggest strength is<n>that she can
run on both turf and dirt.<n>If we were to choose an
individual<n>rival...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She would be limited to running the<n>same tour as
them. And I consider<n>that a drawback, so...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I feel like... maybe I get it... I have to<n>keep loving
everyone in order to be<n>myself.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can't walk the same path as Doto<n>or the
Overlord.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's her only option if she's to have a<n>chance at
victory. Meisho Doto and<n>T.M. Opera O are both
still amongst<n>the strongest runners.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Normal training won't cut it. If Agnes<n>Digital wants
to beat them, she must<n>build up experiences so
varied that no<n>one else on the track will know her
next move.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Come to think of it... King said<n>something similar...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Race against as many as you can and<n>absorb
everything. And then...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Become a true all-rounder. You are a<n>part of what
you cherish most.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I get it now! The way I am now, I can<n>move
forward alongside all<n>Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
They're all my rivals! Which is<n>precisely how I'm
able to—
choice_data_list: Grow through the power of friendship!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Nourishment! That's right! Each Uma<n>has her own
flavor, and I get<n>energized every time I run with
them!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Every day, I get fresh sustenance<n>from my oshis!
There's no better<n>fuel.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
There's no doubt that plenty of<n>runners will
continue contributing to<n>Agnes Digital's growth.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The power of friendship! Yeah... I'll<n>gather power
from everyone little by<n>little...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And then use it for an explosive<n>finale! I feel like
that might really be<n>my style!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It seems like interacting with new<n>runners will
allow Agnes Digital to<n>become even stronger in
the future.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Diversity! That's right. Every<n>Umamusume runs
differently, but<n>everyone runs well!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can worship everyone while taking it<n>all in! I
wanna be a walking<n>Umamusume encyclopedia!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital takes in what she sees<n>earnestly—a
disposition which will<n>certainly tie into her future.
